name: Varanasi Corporate Cricket Trust
description: A professional league for employee-led teams representing recognized organizations.
schedule: Weekend matches with a full round-robin format and knockout finals.
rules: Eligibility is verified before the tournament and captain declarations are mandatory.
points: 4 teams, 12 league games, top 2 advance to finals.
awards: Best Batter, Best Bowler, Best All-rounder, Fair Play Trophy
